subcodes.first_line: O thou excellent penman! This world of being is a written book and an unfolded scroll, if thou canst but perceive it upon this page [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خوش نویس این عالم کون کتاب مسطور و رق منشور است اگر تو توانی در این صفحه
subcodes.subjects: @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
